item.title: Version 1.0.13-dev.5
item.sparkle:releaseNotes:
• Merge branch 'dev' of github.com:vavilov2212/worklog_studio into dev
  • release: windows v1.0.13-dev.5
  • docs: distill refactoring logs into POST_MORTEM_REFACTOR.md, reset CLAUDE.md
  • docs: add refactoring log entry #10 to CLAUDE.md
  • test(item-49): add widget tests for the three drawer widgets
  • docs(items-1-6): document canonical feature scaffold and repository conventions
  • docs: add refactoring log entries #8 and #9 to CLAUDE.md
  • refactor(items-18-19): extract ProjectSelector and TaskSelector components
  • refactor(item-23): register all repositories with get_it
  • refactor(item-22): inject SettingsRepository into WindowsDesktopService via get_it
  • refactor(item-40): remove addPostFrameCallback from drawer _updateDraft methods
  • refactor(item-27): move badge color palette to style system package
  • refactor(item-26): add SidebarColors tokens and replace Colors.white hardcodes
  • refactor(item-28): replace hardcoded SizedBox pixel values with spacing tokens
  • refactor(item-25): replace hardcoded Color(0xFF...) in mini panel with theme tokens
  • refactor(item-8): split mini_panel.dart into focused component files
  • refactor(item-20): extract DeleteConfirmationRow and replace duplicate AnimatedSwitcher blocks
  • refactor(item-17): extract DrawerFormCubitgt; and migrate all three drawers
  • test: add TrackerPanelCubit unit tests covering all public methods (Item 51)
  • test: add BLoC unit tests for HistoryBloc, TasksBloc, ProjectsBloc (Item 52)
  • docs: add refactoring log entries for items 13-16 (feature BLoCs)
  • refactor: create HistoryBloc, TasksBloc, ProjectsBloc; remove PageUiPreferences (items 13-16)
  • docs: add refactoring log entry for item 12 (TrackerPanelCubit)
  • refactor: extract TrackerPanelCubit from GlobalTimeTrackerPanel (item 12)
  • docs: add refactoring log entries for items 8, 9, 10, 11
  • refactor: split tasks_page and projects_page into coordinator + list + table components (items 10, 11)
  • refactor: split history_page.dart into 4 focused files (Item 9)
  • refactor: split mini_panel.dart - extract timer text and list item (Item 8)
  • docs: log Item 7 completion in CLAUDE.md refactoring log
  • refactor: split app_shell.dart into 4 focused files (Item 7)
  • docs: log refactoring entry #6 in CLAUDE.md (items 53-60, 24, 30, 31)
  • refactor: remove silent IdleMonitor catch + complete work_log isolation (items 24, 30, 31)
  • refactor: extract BarChartData builder + move settings to presentation/ (items 53, 56)
  • docs: log refactoring entries #4 and #5 in CLAUDE.md (items 41-48, 50)
  • test: add unit tests for ProjectTaskState, EntityResolver, WorkLogRawDataBloc (items 47, 48, 50)
  • refactor: standardize all imports to package: URIs (item 44)
  • refactor: separate MiniPanelCommandBus from MiniTrackerCubit (item 42)
  • refactor: convert MiniTrackerState to Freezed (item 41)
  • refactor: centralize date/duration formatting into DateFormatter (items 39, 58)
  • refactor: delete unreferenced mock_data.dart (Item 31)
  • refactor: isolate work_log prototype feature (Item 30)
  • refactor: quick wins - dead code removal, folder renames, dep cleanup
